div.div: This is kind of like a Source family tree, showing what games used other games as a base, starting with Quake. I also included some non-Source games since I thought their origins were interesting. Feel free to suggest improvements if you think something is wrong or could be added. I don't plan on adding every single mod or game that could fit here, but if you think one deserves to be added feel free to let me know.
Note that while many Source 1 games were upgraded to later engine versions after release, they are listed here as they were at release.
